elections.note: Election-night numerator = 270,752 ballots from OCROV's FIRST post-poll-close report (Cumulative Results Report, 'November_02,_2010 Run_01', Run Date/Time 11/02/2010 07:51:29 pm), 0 of 2,080 precincts counted = all vote-by-mail received before Election Day (Precinct Ballots Cast 0; Vote-by-Mail/Total Ballots Cast 270,752). 270,752 / 898,205 certified = 30.14%. Pre-epollbook (OC adopted iPad e-pollbooks + Voter's Choice Act vote centers at the March 2020 primary). ASV never adopted. Denominator from CA SoS Statement of Vote, Voter Participation Statistics by County (Orange Total Voters 898,205 = Precinct 432,048 + VBM 466,157). Run 01 PDF recovered from Wayback at ocvote.com/live/gen2010/November_02,_2010_Run_01/cumulative.pdf.

Election-night numerator = 385,929 ballots from OCROV's FIRST post-poll-close report (Cumulative Totals, gen2012 Run01, Run Date/Time 11/06/2012 07:45:25 pm), 0 of 1,977 precincts counted = all vote-by-mail received before Election Day (Precinct Ballots Cast 0; Vote-by-Mail 380,666; Total Ballots Cast 385,929). 385,929 / 1,133,204 certified = 34.06%. Pre-epollbook. ASV never adopted. Denominator from CA SoS Voter Participation Statistics by County (Orange Total Voters 1,133,204 = Precinct 552,018 + VBM 581,186). Run01 cumulative.pdf recovered from Wayback at ocvote.com/fileadmin/live/gen2012/Run01/cumulative.pdf.

Election-night numerator = 250,187 ballots from OCROV's FIRST post-poll-close report (Cumulative Totals, gen2014 Run 01, Run Date/Time 11/04/2014 07:54:23 pm), 0 of 1,863 precincts counted = all vote-by-mail received before Election Day (Precinct Ballots Cast 0; Absentee/Total Ballots Cast 250,187). 250,187 / 640,358 certified = 39.07%. Pre-epollbook. ASV never adopted. Denominator from CA SoS Voter Participation Statistics by County (Orange Total Voters 640,358 = Precinct 252,472 + VBM 387,886). Run 01 cumulative.pdf recovered from Wayback at ocvote.com/fileadmin/live/gen2014/Run 01/cumulative.pdf.

Election-night numerator = 430,263 ballots from OCROV's FIRST post-poll-close report (gen2016 Run 01 'Total Voters' turnout report, header time 11/08/2016 08:07 PM): 'Total Number of Voters : 430,263 of 1,535,967 = 28.01%', 'Precincts Reporting 0 of 1,668' = all vote-by-mail received before Election Day. 430,263 / 1,239,405 certified = 34.72%. Pre-epollbook. ASV never adopted. Denominator from CA SoS Voter Participation Statistics by County (Orange Total Voters 1,239,405 = Precinct 516,801 + VBM 722,604). Run 01 turnout.pdf recovered from Wayback at ocvote.com/fileadmin/live/gen2016/Run 01/turnout.pdf (no Run 01 cumulative.pdf was archived; turnout.pdf gives the clean first-report ballot total).

Election-night numerator = 362,079 ballots from OCROV's FIRST post-poll-close report (Cumulative Totals, gen2018 Run 01, Run Date/Time 11/06/2018 07:49:18 pm), 0 of 1,546 precincts counted = all vote-by-mail received before Election Day (Precinct Ballots Cast 0; Vote-by-Mail/Total Ballots Cast 362,079). 362,079 / 1,106,729 certified = 32.72%. Pre-epollbook. ASV never adopted. Denominator from CA SoS Voter Participation Statistics by County (Orange Total Voters 1,106,729 = Precinct 393,423 + VBM 713,306). Run 01 cumulative.pdf recovered from Wayback at ocvote.com/fileadmin/live/gen2018/Run 01/cumulative.pdf.

Election-night numerator = 442,334 ballots from OCROV's FIRST post-poll-close report (Cumulative Results Report Run 1, Run Time 8:00 PM, Run Date 11/08/2022), 0 of 2,169 precincts/vote-centers counted = all vote-by-mail received before Election Day. 442,334 / 994,277 certified = 44.49%. Post-epollbook (e-pollbooks + Voter's Choice Act vote centers since March 2020). ASV never adopted. Denominator from CA SoS Voter Participation Statistics by County (Orange Total Voters 994,277 = Precinct 164,115 + VBM 830,162). Numerator from OCROV live Run_01 cumulative.pdf.

Election-night numerator = 718,019 ballots from OCROV's FIRST post-poll-close report (Cumulative Results Report Run 1, Run Time 8:00 PM, Run Date 11/05/2024), 0 of 2,294 precincts/vote-centers counted = all vote-by-mail received before Election Day. 718,019 / 1,417,397 certified = 50.66%. Post-epollbook. ASV never adopted (OC verifies signatures by hand). Denominator from CA SoS Voter Participation Statistics by County (Orange Total Voters 1,417,397 = Precinct 323,223 + VBM 1,094,174). Numerator from OCROV live Run_01 cumulative.pdf.

notes: Non-COVID PRE-2020 baseline plus 2022/2024; the 2020 general is deliberately EXCLUDED as an early-voting/COVID outlier. Definition: election-night % = ballots in OCROV's FIRST post-poll-close 'Cumulative Results Report' (Run 01, ~7:45-8:07 PM, all vote-by-mail / 0 precincts counted) divided by CA SoS certified final ballots cast (Voter Participation Statistics by County, 'Total Voters'). All seven first-report numerators are PRIMARY: 2010 from ocvote.com/live/gen2010/November_02,_2010_Run_01/cumulative.pdf; 2012 from ocvote.com/fileadmin/live/gen2012/Run01/cumulative.pdf; 2014 from .../gen2014/Run 01/cumulative.pdf; 2016 from .../gen2016/Run 01/turnout.pdf (no Run 01 cumulative.pdf archived); 2018 from .../gen2018/Run 01/cumulative.pdf -- all recovered via the Wayback Machine -- and 2022/2024 from OCROV's live ocvote.gov Run_01 cumulative.pdf. Adoption: Orange County deployed iPad electronic pollbooks and Voter's Choice Act vote centers starting the March 3, 2020 presidential primary, so 2010-2018 are PRE-epollbook and 2022/2024 are POST. Automated signature verification (ASV) was NEVER adopted (staff compare envelope-image signatures by hand), so vs_asv = 'n/a' (no adoption boundary) for every election. Like-to-like first-report share: PRESIDENTIAL generals 34.06% (2012, pre) -> 34.72% (2016, pre) -> 50.66% (2024, post); MIDTERM generals 30.14% (2010, pre) -> 39.07% (2014, pre) -> 32.72% (2018, pre) -> 44.49% (2022, post). The post-epollbook first-report share runs clearly higher than the pre-epollbook baseline in both presidential and midterm series, though the post period coincides with the all-mail Voter's Choice Act rollout, which independently shifts ballots into the pre-Election-Day mail batch that constitutes Run 01.
